source_pr.title: ddl:support drop index for the partitioned table.
source_pr.body:
## What have you changed? (mandatory)
support drop index for the partitioned table
* We first need to get all the partition IDs and then we need to delete the index in each partition.
* Fix issue #7222 

Take this as an example:
```sql
mysql> set @@tidb_enable_table_partition = 1;
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.00 sec)

mysql> create table tr(
    ->         id int, name varchar(50),
    ->         purchased date
    ->     )
    ->     partition by range( year(purchased) ) (
    ->         partition p0 values less than (1990),
    ->         partition p1 values less than (1995),
    ->         partition p2 values less than (2000),
    ->         partition p3 values less than (2005),
    ->         partition p4 values less than (2010),
    ->         partition p5 values less than (2015)
    ->        );
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.01 sec)

mysql>  INSERT INTO tr VALUES
    ->     (1, 'desk organiser', '2003-10-15'),
    ->     (2, 'alarm clock', '1997-11-05'),
    ->     (3, 'chair', '2009-03-10'),
    ->     (4, 'bookcase', '1989-01-10'),
    ->     (5, 'exercise bike', '2014-05-09'),
    ->     (6, 'sofa', '1987-06-05'),
    ->     (7, 'espresso maker', '2011-11-22'),
    ->     (8, 'aquarium', '1992-08-04'),
    ->     (9, 'study desk', '2006-09-16'),
    ->     (10, 'lava lamp', '1998-12-25');
Query OK, 10 rows affected (0.10 sec)

mysql> create index idx1 on tr (purchased);
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.04 sec)

mysql> select count(purchased) from tr use index(idx1);
+------------------+
| count(purchased) |
+------------------+
|               10 |
+------------------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)

mysql> drop index idx1 on tr;
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.03 sec)

mysql> select count(purchased) from tr use index(idx1);
ERROR 1176 (42000): Key 'idx1' doesn't exist in table 'tr'
```

## What is the type of the changes? (mandatory)

New feature
- New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)

## How has this PR been tested? (mandatory)
Unit tests.

## Does this PR affect documentation (docs/docs-cn) update? (mandatory)

No

## Does this PR affect tidb-ansible update? (mandatory)

No

## Does this PR need to be added to the release notes? (mandatory)
No

fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
